items.headline: The Mag 7 plus these three AI companies make up the new Fab 10
items.summary: The Magnificent Seven plus SpaceX (SPCX), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), and OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) equal the Fab 10. Could this trio of AI mega-IPOs bring enthusiasm back to the tech space previously dominated by the Mag 7? Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Ines Ferré and Innovator From Goldman Sachs Asset Management chief investment strategist Tim Urbanowicz weigh in on the renewed investor sentiment these companies could bring to the AI trade. The Magnificent Seven consists of Meta Platforms (META), Microsoft (MSFT), Alphabet (GOOGL, GOOG), Amazon (AMZN), Apple (AAPL), Nvidia (NVDA), and Elon Musk's Tesla (TSLA).
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: SpaceX nears $3 trillion market cap, topping Amazon and Microsoft
items.summary: SpaceX (SPCX) stock continues to reach new heights since its IPO last week, already breaking above $200 per share while its nearly $3 trillion market cap sets it up as a heavy hitter among Big Tech peers. Innovator From Goldman Sachs Asset Management chief investment strategist Tim Urbanowicz and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma discuss the FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out) rally that has pushed SpaceX so high in just a few trading days. SpaceX has also completed a deal to acquire AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion.
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.
